visible_public_consequences: Psanan public life visibly reflects the dominant populations listed in canon.
Secondary populations appear as durable resident blocs rather than polity-defining majorities.
institutional_visibility: Institutions and street-level expectations align with the canonical demographic balance.
adjacency_influence: Drow, Duergar, Deep Gnomes, Kuo-Toa, and Derro form the dominant Underdark base; Humans, Tieflings, and Yuan-Ti remain permanent secondary surface-facing and port-facing populations.
visitor_facing_observations: A visitor would notice the dominant bloc first, then the stable secondary populations and any explicit exclusions or shunned groups.
setting_use_summary: Use Psanan with the roster exactly as resolved in canon; do not broaden or soften exclusions without explicit corrective release.
